metadata.title: CONATUS | Consulting, Training and Technology
metadata.description: We deliver consulting, training and technology solutions as an integrated ecosystem to help your business achieve sustainable success.

hero.title: Transform Your Drive to Endure into Sustainable Success
hero.description: Through consulting, training and technology solutions delivered as an integrated ecosystem, we increase your efficiency, strengthen decision-making and guide long-term success.

slides.training: Training — lean thinking and shop-floor application

deger.title: The Conatus Working Model
deger.subtitle: DEGER — Assessment and Development Guide
deger.descriptionIntro: Conatus delivers consulting, training and technology services through
deger.descriptionAfterHighlight: . DEGER aims to understand the current state, clarify targeted development and guide implementation to produce lasting results.

evaluation.title: ASSESSMENT
evaluation.heading: See the Current State
items: We analyze processes and performance holistically.
We create a data-driven snapshot of the current state.
We make real problems and improvement areas visible.
evaluation.quote: Correct problem definition is the foundation of the right solution.

development.title: DEVELOPMENT
development.heading: Design the Future
items: We set clear and measurable development goals.
We plan short, medium and long-term actions.
development.quote: Development without a clear target does not produce progress.

guidance.title: GUIDANCE
guidance.heading: Guide Implementation
items: We guide planned development in the field.
We support teams and monitor applications.
guidance.quote: Real value emerges when it is applied.

services.title: Take Your Business to the Future
services.description: Achieve sustainable success with our holistic solutions in consulting, training and technology.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: We support your growth with strategic roadmaps and data-driven recommendations.

training.title: Training
training.description: We design custom training programs to enhance your team's competencies.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: We support your operations end to end with the CIP software platform and custom production hardware.

whyUs.title: Work With Us
whyUs.subtitle: We see your success as our own and add value with solutions tailored to your business.

holistic.title: Integrated model
holistic.description: We address consulting, training and technology solutions within an integrated model, designing processes systematically across the entire organization rather than in isolation.

field.title: Field focus
field.description: We believe success is won on the production floor, not in offices. We design structures that are applicable in the field, aligned with operational reality and deliver results.

measurable.title: Sustainable outcomes
measurable.description: We track measurable improvements in every project and ensure transformation becomes a lasting culture.

references.description: Organisations we have worked with on consulting, training and technology projects. The outcomes we delivered together are the reference for Conatus's reliability and expertise.

metadata.title: CONATUS | About
metadata.description: About Conatus, our mission and vision, values and team.

about.title: About Us
paragraphs: Conatus expresses a being's drive to sustain and develop its existence. Inspired by this philosophy, we help the organizations we consult unlock their full potential, strengthen their presence by overcoming challenges and achieve sustainable growth.
We see the business not as a structure made of separate parts, but as a living whole formed by interacting systems.

vision.title: What Kind of World Do We Envision Tomorrow?
vision.description: Discover our mission and vision for the future.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To unlock the potential of organizations and individuals through a systematic approach centered on lean thinking.

visionCard.title: Our Vision
visionCard.description: To be the architect of sustainable success in the global market by supporting lean approaches with innovative technologies.

values.title: Foundations of Our Culture
values.description: The core values and guiding principles that shape our company culture and way of working.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: The talented professionals behind our success.

murat.name: Murat ŞEN
bio: As founder of Conatus, he delivers consulting and training in lean management and operational excellence.
He supports organizations on their sustainable development journey with hands-on experience across assessment, development and guidance.

tayfun.name: Tayfun YÖRÜ
bio: As a senior consultant, he provides field-focused guidance to teams on production and process improvement projects.
He contributes to measurable results through lean tools and data-driven approaches.

cta.title: Would you like to apply our approach in your company?
cta.description: Contact us to plan the first assessment step together.

metadata.title: CONATUS | Privacy & KVKK Policy
metadata.description: How Conatus processes personal data under Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK).

privacy.title: Privacy & KVKK Policy
privacy.intro: At Conatus we take the security of your personal data seriously. This notice explains what data we collect through our website and contact channels, why we process it, and your rights.
privacy.disclaimer: This text is for information only. For specific situations, contact us at info@conatus.com.tr.

sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: Under Turkish Law No. 6698 (KVKK), the data controller is CONATUS.

sections.title: Personal data we process
paragraphs: Via the contact form: first name, last name, email, phone, optional company/organization, message content and selected subject.
If you opt in: record of consent to commercial electronic messages.
Technical data: IP address, browser information and submission time (for security and logging, kept to a minimum).

sections.title: Purposes and legal bases
paragraphs: To respond to your request, arrange introductory calls and evaluate service inquiries.
To comply with legal obligations and protect our legitimate interests.
Marketing activities only where you have given explicit consent.

sections.title: Transfers and retention
paragraphs: Data may be shared with service providers required to operate our services (e.g. email infrastructure) and authorities where legally required.
Contact records are retained for reasonable periods depending on the nature of the request; unnecessary data is deleted or anonymized.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Under KVKK Article 11 you may request information about processing, correction or deletion, learn the purpose of processing and object.
Send requests to info@conatus.com.tr; we will respond within statutory time limits.

metadata.title: CONATUS | Consulting
metadata.description: Profitability and efficiency-focused consulting. Capacity, cost, productivity and culture transformation through problem, solution and outcome.

hero.title: Discover our profitability and efficiency-focused consulting solutions
hero.description: Through our DEGER working model, we assess your corporate and operational processes, shape your company's future with tailored strategies, and guide you at every step of a productive transformation journey.

banner.title: Don't slow down as you grow
banner.description: We remove your organisation's invisible brakes — understanding the current state, clarifying targeted development, and guiding implementation to deliver lasting results.

cases.title: Problem → Solution → Outcome
cases.description: Across capacity, cost, efficiency and culture transformation, we address your challenges, the Conatus approach and targeted outcomes in one Problem → Solution → Outcome framework.

deger.title: Don't slow down as you grow — remove invisible brakes
deger.lead: Conatus delivers consulting, training and technology through DEGER — Assessment and Development Guide. We understand the current state, clarify targeted development and guide implementation to deliver lasting results.
problems: Current state is not defined clearly and measurably
Improvement initiatives are not tied to concrete targets
Disconnect between strategy and daily operations
Fragmented projects fail to lift holistic performance
Implementation does not sustain on the shop floor

solution.intro: We structure assessment, development and guidance as an integrated transformation journey through the DEGER model.

blocks.title: Assessment
items: Holistic analysis of resource efficiency, process effectiveness and impact
Data-driven snapshot of the current state
Making real problems and development areas visible

blocks.title: Development
items: Short-, medium- and long-term action plans

blocks.title: Guidance
items: Team support and reinforcement of standards

solution.quote: The right problem definition is the foundation of the right solution.

items: Systematic improvement framework across the organisation
In-house capability that reduces consultant dependency
Foundations of a lasting lean culture
outcomes.quote: Real value emerges when it is applied.

capacity.title: Delivery times not improving despite capacity investments?
capacity.lead: Conatus addresses the problem through a value stream lens, not a single metric. We reveal hidden capacity and clarify where investments will have impact.
problems: Delivery times not shortening despite capacity investments
Headcount increases contribute little to output
WIP and intermediate stock levels rising
Coordination load and complexity increasing
Cost growth pressuring profitability

solution.intro: We make bottlenecks visible through value stream and constraint analysis and set investment priorities on data.
solution.quote: Development without clear goals produces no progress.

items: Bottleneck processes identified against takt time and customer demand
Total capacity loss analysed in production hours
WIP levels analysed with improvement priorities
ROI and payback models for planned investments
outcomes.quote: Real value emerges when it is applied.

cph.title: Turn hourly production cost into your improvement compass
cph.lead: Hourly production cost is not just accounting data. Conatus treats CPH increases as signals from the operational system — making losses visible and separating root causes.
problems: Rising defects, rework and customer complaints
Overtime and temporary labour becoming normal
Stock, spare parts and material waste becoming invisible
Air freight, demurrage and emergency logistics costs
Loss of control over energy, utilities and transport costs

solution.intro: All losses are categorised by department and type, quantified with their financial equivalents.

blocks.title: Historical data analysis
items: Defect, downtime, overtime, energy and logistics data

blocks.title: Operational outcomes
items: Defects, waste and downtime made visible
Balance and control in resource use

blocks.title: Financial outcomes
items: Real cost burdens calculated by department
Financial equivalent of preventable losses clarified
Potential capacity and cost savings surfaced
Investment and improvement priorities set correctly

outcomes.footer: Result: pressure on CPH eases and profitability is restored. Management moves from reporting cost to managing it.

eph.title: Why is earnings per headcount declining?
eph.lead: In mature organisations, post-growth profitability often falls because productivity per person drops. Workforce structure is addressed through systematic analysis, not intuition.
problems: Rising overhead in processes
Lack of standardisation and rationalisation in work practices
Insufficient multiskilling and job rotation
Missing protocols and criteria in hiring
Limited output growth despite more labour
Inefficient workforce structure creating pressure in tough periods

solution.intro: Work elements are broken down to determine optimal headcount on a data basis.

blocks.title: Work study and line balancing
items: Work elements and time breakdown per role
Repetitive, periodic, idle and variation times identified

blocks.title: Norm staffing and standardisation
items: Comprehensive norm staffing for direct and indirect staff
Historical data analysis and statistical modelling
Department-level analysis of current vs required workforce
Measurable improvement in EPH and profitability

culture.title: Cultural stagnation weakens competitiveness
culture.lead: When organisational culture is not consciously defined, processes depend on individuals and performance loses sustainability. Conatus treats cultural stagnation as a systemic problem.
problems: Different work habits and methods across departments
Person-dependent processes and decision mechanisms
Pockets of excellence but declining holistic performance
Mismatch between leadership behaviour and company values
Internal politics and power imbalances
Disconnect between vision and daily operations

solution.intro: We measure cultural and process maturity and design an operating system unique to your organisation.

blocks.title: Assessment
items: Leadership behaviour and management system review
Shared operational language and standard work culture
Organisation structure aligned with strategic goals

cta.title: Would you like to apply our approach in your company?
cta.description: Contact us to plan the first assessment step together.

metadata.title: CONATUS | Technology
metadata.description: Conatus Improvement Platform (software) and Conatus Improvement Products (hardware) — continuous improvement with #CIP4CIP.

slogan.note: Conatus Improvement Platform for Commercial Important Person

hero.title: Measure, connect and sustain through digital transformation
hero.description: On the software side, digitise with the Conatus Improvement Platform (CIP); on the hardware side, bring production lines, robotics and lean mechanical systems to the shop floor with Conatus Improvement Products — Platform and Products in one ecosystem.

overview.title: Two complementary technology lines
overview.description: Conatus Improvement Platform (software) and Conatus Improvement Products (hardware) — deployed with consulting and training.

software.title: Software technologies
software.description: Conatus Improvement Platform (CIP): the backbone of digital transformation — digitise module by module, integrate data and scale with SaaS or on-premise.

hardware.title: Hardware technologies
hardware.description: Conatus Improvement Products: serial production lines, robotics, fixtures and karakuri — physical products that connect the shop floor to the Platform.

cip.title: Conatus Improvement Platform
cip.description: CIP lets you manage production and operations through system → sub-system → module structure. License only what you need; consume data from within the platform or from third-party applications flexibly.
cip.hashtagNote: Conatus Improvement Platform — built for continuous improvement under the #CIP4CIP slogan.
cip.videoLabel: Conatus Improvement Platform click and confirmation animation

hierarchy.title: A modular platform at enterprise scale
hierarchy.description: CIP lets you structure production and operations processes in a modular way. With multi-tenant architecture, you can govern your group and affiliates from one platform.
hierarchy.imageAlt: Illustration of CIP modular, multi-tenant enterprise architecture

features.modular: Modular structure: Roll out the components you need step by step and expand scope as you grow.
features.multiTenant: Multi-tenant architecture: Manage your group and affiliates under one roof with a consistent data model.
features.independent: Independent operation: Subsidiaries can continue to run their own processes independently when required.

production.title: Sub-systems
production.description: The production system comprises tool, field, operations, production, maintenance and quality management sub-systems. Each is modular and can be licensed independently or together.

toolManagement.title: Tool management
toolManagement.description: Cutting tool inventory, life tracking and usage optimisation.

fieldManagement.title: Field management
fieldManagement.description: Shop-floor data capture, visibility and real-time response.

operationsManagement.title: Operations management
operationsManagement.description: Daily operations planning, monitoring and performance management.

productionManagement.title: Production management
productionManagement.description: Manage the full flow from production orders through to dispatch on one platform. Expose bottlenecks with VSM, Kanban and line monitoring modules; track output, WIP and delivery performance in real time.

maintenanceManagement.title: Maintenance management
maintenanceManagement.description: Preventive and reactive maintenance, fault logs and equipment reliability.

qualityManagement.title: Quality management
qualityManagement.description: Quality control, non-conformance management and improvement data.

deployment.title: Cloud or on-premises deployment
deployment.description: Cloud for a fast start; on-premises deployment for sectors with high data-security requirements.

cloud.title: Cloud
cloud.description: Fast go-live, central updates and lower infrastructure overhead.

onPrem.title: On-Premises Deployment
onPrem.description: Data stays within your organisation; suitable for closed networks and defence-industry environments.

integration.title: A flexible data ecosystem
integration.description: Each module can source the data it needs from other CIP modules or from third-party applications.

hub.figureLabel: CIP integration hub: three data sources converge at the platform core
hub.caption: Data flows converge at the CIP core

internal.title: Shared data model
internal.description: Consistent data flow across sub-systems and modules.

external.title: Enterprise applications
external.description: ERP, MES, BI, IoT and custom API integrations.

flexible.title: Works with your existing stack
flexible.description: Gradual digitisation while protecting current investments.

licensing.title: Modular licensing
licensing.description: License CIP at system, production system or individual module level. Combine subscription or lifetime usage with floating or fixed license models to match how your operation works.

system.title: Platform
system.description: Near full-platform scope; holistic licensing for groups and multi-site organisations.

subsystem.title: System
subsystem.description: One or more production systems — tool, field, operations, production, maintenance or quality.

module.title: Module
module.description: Individual modules such as VSM, Kanban or line monitoring; expand as needs grow.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Term-based usage with updates and support for predictable operational spend.

perpetual.title: Lifetime usage
perpetual.description: One-time acquisition suited to long-term ownership and closed-network or on-premise deployments.

floating.title: Floating license
floating.description: A pool of concurrent users shared across shifts and stations for flexible access.

fixed.title: Fixed license
fixed.description: Assignment tied to a user, role or device for auditable, predictable access.

cta.title: Let's plan your license structure together
cta.description: Get a quote and configuration proposal for your scope, commercial and usage model combination.

hardware.title: From shop floor to data, from data to action
hardware.description: We design and build serial production lines, robotics, fixtures, racks and karakuri — physical products that connect to the Platform through sensor and automation layers.
hardware.hashtagNote: Built for measurable improvement on the shop floor.
hardware.gifLabel: Production line — robot arm pick and place animation

lines.title: Serial production lines
lines.description: Line design and installation aligned with product and volume needs.
lines.imageAlt: Panoramic view of a serial production line and industrial automation

fixtures.title: Fixtures and racks
fixtures.description: Custom apparatus for assembly, storage and material flow.
fixtures.imageAlt: Panoramic view of fixtures and material flow on the shop floor

karakuri.title: Karakuri and auxiliary systems
karakuri.imageAlt: Karakuri and lean mechanical auxiliary systems

custom.title: Custom engineering
custom.description: Discovery, design, build and commissioning — project delivery through DEGER.
custom.imageAlt: Panoramic view of custom engineering and project design

ecosystem.title: Discover our consulting and training services
ecosystem.description: We deliver consulting, training and technology through the DEGER model. We help ensure your software and hardware technology investments deliver sustainable results.

cta.title: Let's talk demo, deployment or custom engineering
cta.description: Plan the first step for your Platform or Products project; see the CIP section for licensing options.

hero.easeLabel: How it makes your job easier
